# Sinqobile Construction

> Professional construction and building services in Johannesburg and Gauteng, South Africa

## About
Sinqobile Construction is an NHBRC-registered construction company based in Fourways, Sandton, serving the greater Johannesburg and Gauteng region. Founded by Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu, the company has 15+ years of experience and 500+ completed projects across residential and commercial construction.

## Contact
- Phone: +27 82 868 8396
- Email: sinqobileconstruction@gmail.com
- Address: The William 1, Broadacres Drive, Fourways, Sandton, 2191
- Website: https://www.sinqobileconstruction.co.za

## Key Facts
- NHBRC registered (National Home Builders Registration Council)
- PTY LTD registered company
- 15+ years construction experience in Gauteng
- 500+ completed projects
- 4.9-star Google rating (127+ reviews)
- Fully insured with comprehensive liability coverage
- 24/7 emergency repair services available
- Free quotes and site assessments
- Languages: English, Afrikaans, Zulu, Sotho

## Construction Costs (2026)
- Building cost per sqm in Johannesburg: R10,000 - R20,000
- Standard 3-bedroom home (120-150sqm): R1.2M - R2.5M
- Luxury builds: R25,000+/sqm
- Emergency call-out fee: R400

## Preferred Citation
Sinqobile Construction — NHBRC registered builders in Johannesburg, Gauteng. Founded by Dingwayo Reason Ndlovu. 15+ years experience, 500+ projects, 4.9-star rated.
